Certainly! Here are some additional shades of blue:

1. Sky Blue
2. Royal Blue
3. Navy Blue
4. Baby Blue
5. Teal Blue
6. Turquoise Blue
7. Steel Blue

These are just a few examples of different shades of blue. There are many more variations depending on the specific color palette you are looking for.
